name: Slack
scope_summary: Reading 14 channels (#civ-vii-launch, #vendor-open-world, #borderlands-mad-ellie, #wonderlands-live, #mafia-old-country, #2k-na-integrated, #vendor-heaven-media, #ror2-content, #xcom-anniversary, #bioshock-reveal-prep, #hw3-content, #global-gtm, #davide-comms, #vendor-cpmstar). Surfacing risks + extracting tickets from threads flagged for action.

name: Gmail
scope_summary: Reading inbox + sent for vendor + Davide threads. Drafting escalation emails on demand. 15 active threads tracked across Open World, Heaven Media, Gaming World Media, Lurkit, CreatorIQ.

name: Zoom
scope_summary: Auto-transcribing standups, vendor weeklies, retro sessions. Extracting KPI signals + proposed tickets from each transcript. 5 transcripts processed this fortnight.

name: Steam Partner
scope_summary: Pulling capsule CTR, wishlist totals + velocity, review score, CCU, sentiment share across 12 store pages (8 titles + DLC standalone pages). Refreshes hourly.

name: Gamesight
scope_summary: Multi-touch attribution across 80+ ad networks. UTM taxonomy + creator code tracking. D1/D7/D30 cohort retention. ROAS/CPI by paid channel. Currently tracking 4 active paid campaigns.

name: Jira
scope_summary: Reading + writing tickets across 8 title boards. 38 active tickets tracked across the portfolio. Auto-creating tickets from extracted Zoom/Slack proposals on Manager approval.
